formulas.name: f_MapSubTypeBasedOnApprovalType
formulas.expression:
IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Waiver / Rebate") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Deferral Request") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "LPI Waiver / Discount") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Credit Actions") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Subleasing Request") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Change of Ownership")|| ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "LoC Drawdown"), "Credit",
IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Part Exchanges (LG / APU)") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Operational Requests") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Cash to LoC Conversion") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Claims - Deviation from Lease Terms") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Tripartite Agreement"), "Lease Management",
IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Redelivery Buy-outs") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Other Lease Amendments"), "Lease Transaction",
IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Novation Fees (internal)") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Novation Fees (external)") || ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Bond Repurchase"), "Liability Management",
IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Approval_Type__c}, "Change in Technical Budgets"), "Technical", "" ) ) ) ) )

Flow.interviewLabel: Prodigy - Deal Approval - Map Sub Type Based On Approval Type {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Prodigy - Deal Approval - Map Sub Type Based On Approval Type

recordUpdates.name: Prodigy_Deal_Approval_Map_Subtype_Based_On_Approval_Type
recordUpdates.label: Prodigy - Deal Approval - Map Subtype Based On Approval Type
